'''âdh-z-m-v''' ('''kadhazmevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:westernize|westernize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-z-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:westernize|westernize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-z-m-v
|-
! Lemma
| kadhazmevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhazmevoko|thidhazmevoko]] || [[word:jidhazmevoko|jidhazmevoko]] || [[word:shidhazmevoko|shidhazmevoko]] || [[word:kidhazmevoko|kidhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhazmevoko|thuthudhazmevoko]] || [[word:jujudhazmevoko|jujudhazmevoko]] || [[word:shushudhazmevoko|shushudhazmevoko]] || [[word:kukudhazmevoko|kukudhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhazmevoko|thudhazmevoko]] || [[word:judhazmevoko|judhazmevoko]] || [[word:shudhazmevoko|shudhazmevoko]] || [[word:kudhazmevoko|kudhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhazmevoko|thudhazmevoko]] || [[word:judhazmevoko|judhazmevoko]] || [[word:shudhazmevoko|shudhazmevoko]] || [[word:kudhazmevoko|kudhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhazmevoko|thedhazmevoko]] || [[word:jedhazmevoko|jedhazmevoko]] || [[word:shedhazmevoko|shedhazmevoko]] || [[word:kedhazmevoko|kedhazmevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhazmevoko|thodhazmevoko]] || [[word:jodhazmevoko|jodhazmevoko]] || [[word:shodhazmevoko|shodhazmevoko]] || [[word:kodhazmevoko|kodhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhazmevoko|thodhazmevoko]] || [[word:jodhazmevoko|jodhazmevoko]] || [[word:shodhazmevoko|shodhazmevoko]] || [[word:kodhazmevoko|kodhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhazmevoko|thĂŠdhazmevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhazmevoko|jĂŠdhazmevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhazmevoko|shĂŠdhazmevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhazmevoko|kĂŠdhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhazmevoko|thathadhazmevoko]] || [[word:jajadhazmevoko|jajadhazmevoko]] || [[word:shashadhazmevoko|shashadhazmevoko]] || [[word:kakadhazmevoko|kakadhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhazmevoko|thadhazmevoko]] || [[word:jadhazmevoko|jadhazmevoko]] || [[word:shadhazmevoko|shadhazmevoko]] || [[word:kadhazmevoko|kadhazmevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhazmevoko|thadhazmevoko]] || [[word:jadhazmevoko|jadhazmevoko]] || [[word:shadhazmevoko|shadhazmevoko]] || [[word:kadhazmevoko|kadhazmevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
